fasta.title: Reference FASTA
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA used to build the Bismark index.

bismark_version.title: Bismark Version
bismark_version.description: Select the specific version of Bismark to use (see quay.io/biocontainers/bismark for available versions)

aligner.title: Aligner
aligner.description: Underlying aligner to use for bisulfite mapping.

single_fasta.title: Single FASTA
single_fasta.description: Treat the genome as a single FASTA file rather than a directory of chromosomes.

large_index.title: Large Index
large_index.description: Build a large index (required for genomes > 4 GB).
